content: The autonomous Reflexion agent framework from the original GitHub draft can borrow the graded reflection pedagogy from high school English writing workshops, where reflection is explicitly taught as a step-by-step skill to refine output, rather than an implicit internal capability for large language models. Just as students improve writing by reflecting on feedback from multiple drafts, LLMs can be trained to structure self-reflection the same way students learn to reflect on their own written work: first identifying mismatches between intended meaning and output, then revising to align the two.
